items.title: I've been doing the F-Zero test each time a new model comes out and GPT 5.5 and Codex is…
items.title_zh: 每次新模型出现时我都会进行 F-Zero 测试，GPT 5.5 和 Codex 是……
items.description: I've been doing the F-Zero test each time a new model comes out and GPT 5.5 and Codex is the only combo that built a working game so far. Even made a bunch of other bots to race against. What a insane time to be building. https://t.co/LFwG…
items.description_zh: 每当新模型出现时，我都会进行 F-Zero 测试，而 GPT 5.5 和 Codex 是迄今为止构建可运行游戏的唯一组合。甚至还制作了一堆其他机器人来与之竞争。这是多么疯狂的建设时刻啊。 https://t.co/LFwG…

items.title: Dumbest design mistake in Apple history is folding “find on page” in Safari under “Share.…
items.title_zh: 苹果历史上最愚蠢的设计错误是将 Safari 中的“在页面上查找”折叠到“共享”下......
items.description: Dumbest design mistake in Apple history is folding “find on page” in Safari under “Share.” It is 3 clicks deep and makes no sense.
items.description_zh: 苹果历史上最愚蠢的设计错误是将 Safari 中的“在页面上查找”折叠到“共享”下。点击 3 次，毫无意义。

items.title: Sorry to anyone who thought AI would mean we’d work less (at least for now).
items.title_zh: 对于那些认为人工智能意味着我们会减少工作量的人（至少目前如此），我深表歉意。
items.description: Sorry to anyone who thought AI would mean we’d work less (at least for now). AI makes it easy to explore more than you did before, and so you start doing far more as a result. I regularly have seemingly small things that end up quickly con…
items.description_zh: 对于那些认为人工智能意味着我们会减少工作量的人（至少目前如此），我深表歉意。人工智能让你比以前更容易探索更多内容，因此你开始做更多的事情。我经常会遇到一些看似很小的事情，但最终很快就解决了……

items.title: GPT-5.5 is live.
items.description: GPT-5.5 is live. We’ve been testing the model over the last couple of weeks at Box on our most complex knowledge work evals, and the model saw a 10 percentage point jump on accuracy of these enterprise content tasks vs. GPT-5.4. We test th…
items.description_zh: GPT-5.5 已上线。过去几周，我们一直在 Box 上针对最复杂的知识工作评估测试该模型，与 GPT-5.4 相比，该模型在这些企业内容任务的准确性上提高了 10 个百分点。我们测试…

items.title: Let's see...
items.description: Let's see... Ro Khanna is defending someone who incites murder, "let the streets soak in their red-capitalist blood," and who said America deserved 9/11. Like Saikat Chakrabarti, Ro Khanna is unfit for any job and should lose his seat in C…
items.description_zh: 让我们看看……罗·卡纳（Ro Khanna）正在为一个煽动谋杀的人辩护，“让街道浸透红色资本主义的血液”，并且他说美国活该9/11。像 Saikat Chakrabarti 一样，Ro Khanna 不适合任何工作，应该失去他在 C 的席位……
